IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: OPTIONS FOR LEARNING IS A LEADER IN PREPARING CHILDREN AND SUPPORTING FAMILIES FOR LIFE SUCCESS THROUGH INNOVATIVE, QUALITY CHILD DEVELOPMENT PROGRAMS.
IRS990.MissionDesc: OPTIONS FOR LEARNING IS A LEADER IN PREPARING CHILDREN AND SUPPORTING FAMILIES FOR LIFE SUCCESS THROUGH INNOVATIVE, QUALITY CHILD DEVELOPMENT PROGRAMS.VISION: UNLOCKING THE PROMISE OF EVERY CHILD.
IRS990.Desc: VOUCHER & R&R PROGRAMS - SEE SCHEDULE O VOUCHER PROGRAM - OPTIONS FOR LEARNING IS ABLE TO OFFER SUBSIDIZED CHILD CARE THROUGH CONTRACTS WITH COMMUNITY CHILD CARE PROVIDERS AND REIMBURSEMENTS TO PARENTS THROUGH OBJECTIVE REFERRALS TO CHILD CARE FOR PARENTS AND A VARIETY OF TRAINING PROGRAMS FOR PROVIDERS.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: EARLY LEARNING PROGRAMS - SEE SCHEDULE OEARLY LEARNING PROGRAMS - OPTIONS FOR LEARNING PROVIDES A VARIETY OF EDUCATIONAL AND COMPREHENSIVE DEVELOPMENTAL SERVICES TO CHILDREN AGES 0 TO 5 YEARS OLD, INCLUDING CENTER-BASED AND HOME-BASED OPTIONS. WE OFFER PART-DAY/PART-YEAR AND FULL-DAY/FULL-YEAR OPTIONS FOR FAMILIES DEPENDING ON THEIR NEED FOR CHILDCARE SERVICES. IN PREPARING PRESCHOOLERS AND THEIR FAMILIES FOR KINDERGARTEN AND THE TRANSITION TO ELEMENTARY SCHOOL, OPTIONS FOR LEARNING PROVIDES A HIGH-QUALITY, DEVELOPMENTAL EDUCATIONAL PROGRAM WHICH MEETS THE NEEDS OF THE CHILD WHILE FORMING COLLABORATIVE PARTNERSHIPS WITH SCHOOLS AND COMMUNITY INSTITUTIONS.

ProgSrvcAccomActy3Grp.Desc: SCHOOL-AGE PROGRAMS - SEE SCHEDULE O SCHOOL-AGE PROGRAMS - OPTIONS FOR LEARNING PROVIDES YEAR-ROUND BEFORE AND AFTER SCHOOL AND EDUCATIONAL ENRICHMENT PROGRAMS FOR ELEMENTARY SCHOOL-AGED CHILDREN. ADDITIONAL PROGRAM OFFERINGS INCLUDE AFTER-SCHOOL ENRICHMENT ACTIVITY PROGRAMS FOR ELEMENTARY AND MIDDLE SCHOOL-AGED CHILDREN. OPTIONS FOR LEARNING ALIGNS THEIR SCHOOL-AGE PROGRAMS WITH SCHOOL DISTRICTS IN A WAY THAT IS NOT REPETITIVE OF THE SCHOOL-DAY, BUT RATHER ENRICHES THE EXPERIENCES OF THE CHILDREN TO ENHANCE THEIR LEARNING GOALS AND OBJECTIVES.

ProgSrvcAccomActyOtherGrp.Desc: NUTRITION PROGRAM - OPTIONS PROVIDES MEALS TO CHILDREN IN ITS CENTERS AND REIMBURSEMENT TO LICENSED FAMILY CHILD CARE PROVIDERS FOR MEALS SERVED IN THEIR HOMES TO CHILDREN, IN ACCORDANCE WITH FEDERAL AND STATE LAWS.OTHER CONTRACTS - OPTIONS PROVIDES OTHER CHILD CARE AND SUPPORT SERVICES FOR EXISTING PROGRAMS WHICH ARE FUNDED BY FEDERAL, STATE, AND LOCAL GRANTS AND STIPENDS.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: SCHEDULE A, PART II, LINE 10, EXPLANATION OF OTHER INCOME:
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: OTHER INCOME - 2019 AMOUNT: $ 11,236. 2020 AMOUNT: $ 40,575. 2021 AMOUNT: $ 28,229. 2022 AMOUNT: $ 396,929. 2023 AMOUNT: $ 15,310. CONTRACT SETTLEMENT - 2020 AMOUNT: $ 48,919.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: OPTIONS FOR LEARNING IS EXEMPT FROM FEDERAL INCOME TAXES UNDER SECTION 501(C)(3) OF THE INTERNAL REVENUE CODE (THE "CODE") AND CALIFORNIA INCOME TAXES UNDER SECTION 23701(D) OF THE CALIFORNIA REVENUE AND TAXATION CODE. CONTRIBUTORS, DONORS, AND GRANTORS MAY OBTAIN TAX BENEFITS. IN ADDITION, OPTIONS FOR LEARNING HAS BEEN DETERMINED BY THE INTERNAL REVENUE SERVICE NOT TO BE A "PRIVATE FOUNDATION" WITHIN THE MEANING OF SECTION 509(A) OF THE CODE. OPTIONS FOR LEARNING HAS ADOPTED FASB ASC 740-10, WHICH CLARIFIES THE ACCOUNTING FOR UNCERTAINTY IN INCOME TAXES AND PRESCRIBES A RECOGNITION THRESHOLD AND MEASUREMENT ATTRIBUTE FOR THE FINANCIAL STATEMENT RECOGNITION AND MEASUREMENT OF A TAX POSITION TAKEN OR EXPECTED TO BE TAKEN IN A TAX RETURN. ASC 740-10 REQUIRES THAT AN ORGANIZATION RECOGNIZE IN THE FINANCIAL STATEMENTS THE IMPACT OF THE TAX POSITION, IF THAT POSITION WILL MORE LIKELY THAN NOT BE SUSTAINED ON AUDIT, BASED ON THE TECHNICAL MERITS OF THE POSITION. AS OF AND FOR THE YEARS ENDED JUNE 30, 2024 AND 2023, OPTIONS FOR LEARNING HAD NO MATERIAL UNRECOGNIZED TAX BENEFITS, TAX PENALTIES, OR INTEREST. OPTIONS FOR LEARNING FILES AN EXEMPT RETURN IN THE U.S. FEDERAL JURISDICTION AND THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA.
KELLY O'CONNELL LEFT HER POSITION ON JUNE 30, 2023. SHE RECEIVED A $300,000 SERVANCE PAYMENT.

IssuerName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: CALIFORNIA INFRASTRUCTURE AND ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT BANK

TaxExemptBondsIssuesGrp.PurposeDesc: REVENUE BONDS (OPTIONS FOR LEARNING PROJECT), SERIES 2023

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: A COPY OF FORM 990 WILL BE EMAILED TO OPTIONS FOR LEARNING'S BOARD OF DIRECTORS FOR REVIEW BEFORE IT IS FILED.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: AGENCY PERSONNEL POLICY AND PRACTICE MANDATES THAT OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, AND EMPLOYEES MUST REPORT ANY CONFLICTS OF INTEREST, WHETHER PERCEIVED OR ACTUAL. THOSE WITH A CONFLICT OF INTEREST ARE PROHIBITED FROM INFLUENCING ANY DECISION OR MAKING ANY DECISION RELATED TO THE CONFLICT. BOARD MEMBERS DOCUMENT ANY CONFLICTS ANNUALLY WITH SIGNED DOCUMENT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: LINE 15A: THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS REVIEWS AND APPROVES THE COMPENSATION OF THE CEO AND CFO & COO ON AN ANNUAL BASIS. THEY ESTABLISH THEIR COMPENSATION BASED ON MARKET DATA AND BY UTILIZING AN INDEPENDENT COMPENSATION CONSULTANT. AS WELL AS, INCLUDING THE FORM 990S OF OTHER ORGANIZATIONS AS WELL AS SALARY SURVEYS SPECIFIC TO THE NON-PROFIT SECTOR. IN ADDITION, WHEN THERE IS A TRANSITION IN LEADERSHIP FOR EITHER OF THESE TWO POSITIONS, AN OUTSIDE SEARCH FIRM IS UTILIZED THAT ALSO PROVIDES INSIGHT INTO THE MARKET RATE FOR COMPENSATION. LINE 15B: THE COMPENSATION OF TOP MANAGEMENT IS REVIEWED AND APPROVED BY THE CEO BASED ON MARKET DATA AND BY UTILIZING AN INDEPENDENT COMPENSATION CONSULTANT. AS WELL AS, INCLUDING THE FORM 990S OF OTHER ORGANIZATIONS AS WELL AS SALARY SURVEYS SPECIFIC TO THE NON-PROFIT SECTOR.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, AND THE INDEPENDENT AUDIT AND FORM 990 ARE MADE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.
